subject.description: A frustrated 30-something male media buyer with slightly disheveled hair, wearing a casual button-down shirt. He is sitting at a coffee shop table.
subject.action: Looking intently at a printed analytics report on the table. He has a look of intense concentration and slight disbelief. His hands are hidden or resting naturally out of focus.

setting.location: A trendy, dimly lit coffee shop with a wooden table surface and slightly blurred background details like an espresso machine or warm hanging lights.

composition.camera_angle: Eye-level, slightly angled downwards towards the table to capture both his face and the paperwork.
composition.framing: Rule of thirds. The man's face is on the top right intersection, while the circled paper is on the bottom left.
composition.depth_of_field: Shallow depth of field to keep the man and the paper in sharp focus while completely blurring the noisy coffee shop background.

lighting.direction: Side lit from a nearby window, creating a dramatic, realistic contrast on his face.
lighting.color_grading: Realistic, slightly moody, leaning into cinematic documentary style.

aesthetic_style: High-end photorealism, documentary style photography, authentic ad creative.
negative_prompt: text, watermarks, deformities, bad anatomy, cartoon, illustration, 3d render, artificial lighting, unnatural skin, extra fingers, mutated hands, poorly drawn hands, distorted fingers, weird pens
